title: DORA Metrics Dashboard

list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM deployments ORDER BY environment
list.label: Environment

list.name: copilot_cohort
list.query: All, Copilot Active, Copilot Inactive, Agent Users, Non-Agent Users
list.label: Copilot Cohort

list.name: Deployments
list.rawQuery:
SELECT d.created_at AS time, 'Deploy: ' || d.sha AS text, 'Deployments' AS tags
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

list.name: Incidents
list.rawQuery:
SELECT i.created_at AS time, 'Incident: ' || i.title AS text, 'Incidents' AS tags
FROM issues i
WHERE i.labels @> '[{"name":"incident"}]'
  AND i.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 📊 Throughput — How quickly changes reach production (DORA: Speed)
⏱ Change Lead Time
panels.description:
DORA: Throughput · Median time from PR merge to successful deployment

🟢 Elite: <1 hr  ·  🟡 High: <1 day  ·  🟠 Medium: <1 week  ·  🔴 Low: >1 week

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
    ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.created_at - pr.merged_at)) / 3600
  ) AS median_lead_time_hours
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (
    '$copilot_cohort' = 'All'
    OR ('$copilot_cohort' = 'Copilot Active' AND pr.author_user_id IN (
      SELECT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity
      WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
    ))
    OR ('$copilot_cohort' = 'Copilot Inactive' AND pr.author_user_id NOT IN (
      SELECT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity
      WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
    ))
  )

panels.title: 🚀 Deployment Frequency
panels.description:
DORA: Throughput · Average successful deployments per week

🟢 Elite: >7/wk (daily)  ·  🟡 High: 1-7/wk  ·  🟠 Medium: <1/wk  ·  🔴 Low: <0.25/wk

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*)::float / GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ($__timeTo()::timestamp - $__timeFrom()::timestamp)) / 604800, 1) AS deploys_per_week
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ds.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id)

panels.title: 🔧 Recovery Time (MTTR)
panels.description:
DORA: Stability · Median time to recover from a failed deployment

🟢 Elite: <1 hr  ·  🟡 High: <1 day  ·  🟠 Medium: <1 week  ·  🔴 Low: >1 week

targets.rawSql:
WITH failed_deployments AS (
  SELECT d.id AS deployment_id, d.environment, ds.created_at AS failure_time
  FROM deployments d
  JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
  WHERE ds.state IN ('failure', 'error')
    AND d.environment = '$environment'
    AND ds.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
),
recovery AS (
  SELECT fd.deployment_id, fd.failure_time,
    MIN(ds2.created_at) AS recovery_time
  FROM failed_deployments fd
  JOIN deployments d2 ON d2.environment = fd.environment AND d2.created_at > fd.failure_time
  JOIN deployment_statuses ds2 ON ds2.deployment_id = d2.id AND ds2.state = 'success'
  WHERE ds2.created_at > fd.failure_time
  GROUP BY fd.deployment_id, fd.failure_time
)
SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
  ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (recovery_time - failure_time)) / 3600
) AS median_recovery_hours
FROM recovery

panels.title: ⚠️ Stability — How often changes cause failures (DORA: Reliability)
💥 Change Failure Rate
panels.description:
DORA: Stability · Percentage of deployments resulting in failure

🟢 Elite: 0-5%  ·  🟡 High: 5-10%  ·  🟠 Medium: 10-15%  ·  🔴 Low: >15%

targets.rawSql:
WITH deployment_outcomes AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.created_at,
    (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_state
  FROM deployments d
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
    AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE latest_state IN ('failure', 'error')) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS change_fail_rate_percent
FROM deployment_outcomes

panels.title: 🔄 Deployment Rework Rate
panels.description:
DORA: Stability · Percentage of deployments that are rework (hotfix/bugfix/rollback)

🟢 Good: <5%  ·  🟡 Fair: 5-10%  ·  🟠 Needs Attention: 10-25%  ·  🔴 Critical: >25%

targets.rawSql:
WITH classified_deployments AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.created_at,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM deployment_pull_requests dpr
        JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
        WHERE dpr.deployment_id = d.id
        AND pr.labels @> ANY(ARRAY['[{"name":"hotfix"}]','[{"name":"bugfix"}]','[{"name":"rollback"}]']::jsonb[])
      ) THEN true
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM deployment_statuses ds_prev
        JOIN deployments d_prev ON ds_prev.deployment_id = d_prev.id
        WHERE d_prev.environment = d.environment
        AND ds_prev.state IN ('failure', 'error')
        AND d.created_at - d_prev.created_at < INTERVAL '24 hours'
        AND d_prev.created_at < d.created_at
      ) THEN true
      ELSE false
    END AS is_rework
  FROM deployments d
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
    AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_rework) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS rework_rate_percent
FROM classified_deployments

panels.title: 📈 Throughput Trends — Weekly velocity over time
📈 Change Lead Time Trend
panels.description:
DORA: Throughput · Weekly median change lead time in hours
Lower is better — Elite teams deliver in under 1 hour

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', d.created_at) AS time,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
    ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.created_at - pr.merged_at)) / 3600
  ) AS median_lead_time_hours
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (
    '$copilot_cohort' = 'All'
    OR ('$copilot_cohort' = 'Copilot Active' AND pr.author_user_id IN (
      SELECT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity
      WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
    ))
    OR ('$copilot_cohort' = 'Copilot Inactive' AND pr.author_user_id NOT IN (
      SELECT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity
      WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
    ))
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📈 Deployment Frequency Trend
panels.description:
DORA: Throughput · Weekly deployment count
Higher is better — Elite teams deploy multiple times per day

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', d.created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS deployment_count
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ds.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📉 Recovery Time Trend
panels.description:
DORA: Stability · Weekly median time to recover from failed deployments
Lower is better — Elite teams recover in under 1 hour

targets.rawSql:
WITH failed_deployments AS (
  SELECT d.id AS deployment_id, d.environment, ds.created_at AS failure_time
  FROM deployments d
  JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
  WHERE ds.state IN ('failure', 'error')
    AND d.environment = '$environment'
    AND ds.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
),
recovery AS (
  SELECT fd.deployment_id, fd.failure_time,
    MIN(ds2.created_at) AS recovery_time
  FROM failed_deployments fd
  JOIN deployments d2 ON d2.environment = fd.environment AND d2.created_at > fd.failure_time
  JOIN deployment_statuses ds2 ON ds2.deployment_id = d2.id AND ds2.state = 'success'
  WHERE ds2.created_at > fd.failure_time
  GROUP BY fd.deployment_id, fd.failure_time
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', failure_time) AS time,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
    ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (recovery_time - failure_time)) / 3600
  ) AS median_recovery_hours
FROM recovery
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📉 Stability Trends — Weekly failure rates over time
📊 Change Fail Rate Trend
panels.description:
DORA: Stability · Weekly change failure rate percentage
Lower is better — Elite teams stay under 5%

targets.rawSql:
WITH deployment_outcomes AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.created_at,
    (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) AS latest_state
  FROM deployments d
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
    AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE latest_state IN ('failure', 'error')) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS change_fail_rate_percent
FROM deployment_outcomes
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 📊 Rework Rate Trend
panels.description:
DORA: Stability · Weekly deployment rework rate percentage
Lower is better — tracks hotfix/bugfix/rollback deployments

targets.rawSql:
WITH classified_deployments AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.created_at,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM deployment_pull_requests dpr
        JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
        WHERE dpr.deployment_id = d.id
        AND pr.labels @> ANY(ARRAY['[{"name":"hotfix"}]','[{"name":"bugfix"}]','[{"name":"rollback"}]']::jsonb[])
      ) THEN true
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM deployment_statuses ds_prev
        JOIN deployments d_prev ON ds_prev.deployment_id = d_prev.id
        WHERE d_prev.environment = d.environment
        AND ds_prev.state IN ('failure', 'error')
        AND d.created_at - d_prev.created_at < INTERVAL '24 hours'
        AND d_prev.created_at < d.created_at
      ) THEN true
      ELSE false
    END AS is_rework
  FROM deployments d
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
    AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', created_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_rework) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS rework_rate_percent
FROM classified_deployments
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🤖 Copilot Impact — DORA metrics split by Copilot usage
📊 DORA Metrics by Copilot Cohort
panels.description: Side-by-side comparison of core DORA metrics: Copilot Active (blue) vs Inactive (orange) developers

targets.rawSql:
SELECT metric,
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Copilot Active') AS "Copilot Active",
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Copilot Inactive') AS "Copilot Inactive"
FROM (
SELECT 'Change Lead Time (hrs)' AS metric,
  COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.created_at - pr.merged_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND ds.state = 'success' AND pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Deploy Freq (/wk)' AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::float / GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ($__timeTo()::timestamp - $__timeFrom()::timestamp)) / 604800, 1) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ds.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id)
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Change Fail Rate (%)' AS metric,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) IN ('failure', 'error')) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' AS metric,
  COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (pr.merged_at - pr.created_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Rework Rate (%)' AS metric,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM deployment_pull_requests dpr2
    JOIN pull_requests pr2 ON pr2.id = dpr2.pull_request_id
    WHERE dpr2.deployment_id = d.id
    AND pr2.labels @> ANY(ARRAY['[{"name":"hotfix"}]','[{"name":"bugfix"}]','[{"name":"rollback"}]']::jsonb[])
  )) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort
) sub
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY CASE metric
  WHEN 'Change Lead Time (hrs)' THEN 1
  WHEN 'Deploy Freq (/wk)' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Change Fail Rate (%)' THEN 3
  WHEN 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' THEN 4
  WHEN 'Rework Rate (%)' THEN 5
END

panels.title: 💻 Copilot Productivity — Developer output by cohort
📦 Merged PRs by Cohort
panels.description: DORA: Throughput · Number of merged pull requests by Copilot usage cohort

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort,
  COUNT(*) AS pr_count
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

panels.title: 📝 Lines by Cohort
panels.description: Code Volume · Lines added and deleted by Copilot usage cohort

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort,
  SUM(COALESCE(pr.additions, 0)) AS lines_added,
  SUM(COALESCE(pr.deletions, 0)) AS lines_deleted
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

panels.title: 👤 PRs/Dev by Cohort
panels.description: Productivity · Average merged PRs per developer by Copilot usage cohort

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort,
  COUNT(*)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pr.author_user_id), 0) AS prs_per_user
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

panels.title: 📋 Supplementary Metrics — Additional cycle time indicators
🔁 PR Cycle Time
panels.description:
Supplementary · Median time from PR creation to merge

🟢 Fast: <4 hrs  ·  🟡 Normal: <24 hrs  ·  🟠 Slow: <72 hrs  ·  🔴 Very Slow: >72 hrs

targets.rawSql:
SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
  ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (pr.merged_at - pr.created_at)) / 3600
) AS median_cycle_time_hours
FROM pull_requests pr
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND (
    '$copilot_cohort' = 'All'
    OR ('$copilot_cohort' = 'Copilot Active' AND pr.author_user_id IN (
      SELECT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity
      WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
    ))
    OR ('$copilot_cohort' = 'Copilot Inactive' AND pr.author_user_id NOT IN (
      SELECT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity
      WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
    ))
  )

panels.title: 🚨 Incident Resolution Time
panels.description:
Supplementary · Median time to resolve incidents labeled "incident"

🟢 Fast: <4 hrs  ·  🟡 Normal: <12 hrs  ·  🟠 Slow: <48 hrs  ·  🔴 Very Slow: >48 hrs

targets.rawSql:
SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
  ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.closed_at - i.created_at)) / 3600
) AS median_resolution_hours
FROM issues i
WHERE i.labels @> '[{"name":"incident"}]'
  AND i.closed_at IS NOT NULL
  AND i.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

panels.title: 🚀 Recent Deployments
panels.description: Latest deployments with status

targets.rawSql:
SELECT d.environment, LEFT(d.sha, 7) AS sha, d.created_at,
  ds.state AS latest_status, u.login AS creator
FROM deployments d
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) ds ON true
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = d.creator_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: 📄 Recent PRs
panels.description: Recently merged pull requests with cycle time

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pr.number, pr.title, u.login AS author, pr.created_at, pr.merged_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (pr.merged_at - pr.created_at)) / 3600 AS cycle_time_hours,
  pr.additions, pr.deletions
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY pr.merged_at DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: 🚨 Open Incidents
panels.description: Currently open incidents with age

targets.rawSql:
SELECT i.number, i.title, u.login AS assignee, i.created_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - i.created_at)) / 3600 AS hours_open
FROM issues i
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = i.assignee_user_id
WHERE i.labels @> '[{"name":"incident"}]'
  AND i.state = 'open'
  AND i.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY i.created_at DESC

panels.title: 🔄 Rework Deployments
panels.description: Deployments flagged as rework (hotfix/bugfix/rollback)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT d.environment, LEFT(d.sha, 7) AS sha, d.created_at,
  u.login AS creator,
  string_agg(DISTINCT l.label_name, ', ') AS rework_labels
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(pr.labels) AS label_elem
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT label_elem->>'name' AS label_name) l
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = d.creator_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND l.label_name IN ('hotfix', 'bugfix', 'rollback')
GROUP BY d.id, d.environment, d.sha, d.created_at, u.login
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: 🔬 Copilot Activity Breakdown — Usage patterns across surfaces and features
🖥️ Primary Surface
panels.description:
Distribution of Copilot users by their primary development surface
Based on last_surface_used from GitHub Copilot Metrics API (most recent surface per user-day)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE last_surface
    WHEN 'vscode' THEN 'VS Code'
    WHEN 'intellij' THEN 'IntelliJ'
    WHEN 'neovim' THEN 'Neovim'
    WHEN 'cli' THEN 'CLI'
    WHEN 'dotcom' THEN 'GitHub.com'
    ELSE COALESCE(last_surface, 'Unknown')
  END AS surface,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND last_surface IS NOT NULL
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
GROUP BY last_surface
ORDER BY active_users DESC

panels.title: 🧩 Feature Adoption
panels.description:
Number of unique users using each Copilot feature
Based on used_copilot_coding_agent and used_copilot_code_review from GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT feature, users AS "Unique Users"
FROM (
  SELECT 'Code Completions' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE is_active = true AND completions_count > 0
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Chat' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE is_active = true AND chat_interactions > 0
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Coding Agent' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE used_coding_agent = true
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Code Review' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE used_code_review = true
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
) sub
ORDER BY CASE feature
  WHEN 'Code Completions' THEN 1
  WHEN 'Chat' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Coding Agent' THEN 3
  WHEN 'Code Review' THEN 4
END

panels.title: 📈 Acceptance Rate Trend
panels.description:
Weekly average Copilot suggestion acceptance rate
Higher acceptance = more relevant suggestions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', activity_date::timestamp) AS time,
  ROUND(
    SUM(completions_count * acceptance_rate)::numeric
    / NULLIF(SUM(completions_count), 0) * 100, 1
  ) AS "Acceptance Rate (%)"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND acceptance_rate IS NOT NULL
  AND completions_count > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 🤖 DORA: Agent vs Non-Agent Users
panels.description:
Compare DORA metrics for developers who use Copilot Coding Agent vs those who don't
Based on used_copilot_coding_agent field from GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT metric,
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Agent Users') AS "Agent Users",
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Non-Agent') AS "Non-Agent"
FROM (
  SELECT 'Lead Time (hrs)' AS metric,
    COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.created_at - pr.merged_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
    CASE WHEN agent.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Agent Users' ELSE 'Non-Agent' END AS cohort
  FROM deployments d
  JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
  JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE used_coding_agent = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) agent ON agent.user_id = pr.author_user_id
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND ds.state = 'success' AND pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
    AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND pr.author_user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date)
  GROUP BY cohort

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' AS metric,
    COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (pr.merged_at - pr.created_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
    CASE WHEN agent.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Agent Users' ELSE 'Non-Agent' END AS cohort
  FROM pull_requests pr
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE used_coding_agent = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) agent ON agent.user_id = pr.author_user_id
  WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND pr.author_user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date)
  GROUP BY cohort

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Fail Rate (%)' AS metric,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) IN ('failure', 'error')) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value,
    CASE WHEN agent.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Agent Users' ELSE 'Non-Agent' END AS cohort
  FROM deployments d
  JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE used_coding_agent = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) agent ON agent.user_id = pr.author_user_id
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND pr.author_user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date)
  GROUP BY cohort
) sub
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY CASE metric WHEN 'Lead Time (hrs)' THEN 1 WHEN 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' THEN 2 WHEN 'Fail Rate (%)' THEN 3 END

panels.description:
Average code completions per active user per day
From completions_count in GitHub Copilot Metrics API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(completions_count)::numeric, 1) AS "Completions/Day"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true AND completions_count > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.description:
Average chat interactions per active user per day
From chat_interactions in GitHub Copilot Metrics API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(chat_interactions)::numeric, 1) AS "Chat/Day"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true AND chat_interactions > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.description:
Average suggestion acceptance rate across all users
Higher = more relevant Copilot suggestions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  SUM(completions_count * acceptance_rate)::numeric
  / NULLIF(SUM(completions_count), 0) * 100, 1
) AS "Accept Rate"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true AND acceptance_rate IS NOT NULL AND completions_count > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Agent Adoption
panels.description:
Percentage of Copilot users who have used the Coding Agent feature
From used_copilot_coding_agent in GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE used_coding_agent = true) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0), 1
) AS "Agent Adoption %"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Review Adoption
panels.description:
Percentage of Copilot users who have used the Code Review feature
From used_copilot_code_review in GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE used_code_review = true) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0), 1
) AS "Review Adoption %"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

description: Engineering performance dashboard based on the DORA (DevOps Research & Assessment) framework. Tracks the four key DORA metrics — Deployment Frequency, Change Lead Time, Change Failure Rate, and Mean Time to Recovery — with Copilot impact analysis.
